Flag clear problems including:
- The document/page title or title-like prominent text is tagged as P/Span instead of H1/H2.
- A visible section/subsection heading has the wrong level for its visual prominence or nesting.

- Body text, schedule rows, table rows, labels, page numbers, headers/footers, or fine print are tagged as H1-H6.

Be conservative: only use severity=error when the rendered page and current tag make the correction clear. Use warning for ambiguous visual hierarchy or multi-page context uncertainty.

  3. /P  (text: "Much like software defects (i.e., bugs), defective artifacts can propagate throughout an SSC and affect its security posture. A noteworthy example of such a defect is Log4 S hell ,")

  8. /LBody  (text: "1. Artifact, step , or actor compromise: A n attacker compromises an element of the SSC (see ) to modify an artifact or the information of such.")
  9. /LBody  (text: "2. Propagation: T he attack propagates throughout the chain .")
